prompt: Add a SalesTracker component to BakeryOS that shows estimated revenue by recipe for the week. It needs to read completed work orders from storage and sum up the estimatedCost per recipe name.

assertions.text: Uses correct localStorage key 'bakeryos_work_orders' (not 'sourdough_work_orders', 'work_orders', or any other variant)
Filters work orders by status === 'complete' (correct WorkOrderStatus value, not 'completed' or 'done')
Groups or sums using lineItems[].recipeName to identify recipe (not a made-up top-level recipeName field on WorkOrder)
References estimatedCost field on WorkOrder (correct field name, not revenue or totalCost)
